title: 「Either ... or ...」句型
titleEn: Using Either ... or ... to present two alternatives

source.file: Sentence Structure 104 -「Either ... or ...」表示兩者擇一.pdf

formula: Either + Subject A + or + Subject B + verb + other information

formulas.formula: Either + Subject A + or + Subject B + verb + other information
Subject + auxiliary/modal verb + either + verb phrase A + or + verb phrase B
Subject + verb + either + A + or + B

example: Either John or Mary needs to go.
exampleZh: 約翰或瑪麗其中一人需要去。

examples.en: Either John or Mary needs to go.
examples.zh: 約翰或瑪麗其中一人需要去。

examples.en: I could either continue or give up.
examples.zh: 我可以選擇繼續，或者放棄。

examples.en: The meeting will be either today or tomorrow.
examples.zh: 會議會在今天或明天舉行。

meaning.zh: Either ... or ... 用來提出兩個選擇、可能性、人物、事物、動作或解釋。

rules.zh: Either 和 or 後面的兩個選項通常應使用相同的文法形式。
rules.en: The two alternatives after either and or should normally use the same grammatical form.
examples: We can either eat at this restaurant or eat at home.

rules.zh: Either 應放在第一個被比較的選項之前。
rules.en: Either should be placed immediately before the first part being compared.
examples: She will either call us or send us a message.
She will bring either fruit or cake.

rules.zh: 兩個選項應保持平行結構，例如名詞配名詞、形容詞配形容詞、動詞詞組配動詞詞組。
rules.en: Keep the two alternatives parallel, such as noun + noun, adjective + adjective or verb phrase + verb phrase.
examples: The bag is either black or blue.
We can either take the bus or walk home.

rules.zh: 連接兩個主語時，動詞通常配合較接近動詞的主語。
rules.en: When either ... or ... joins two subjects, the verb normally agrees with the subject closer to it.
examples: Either the teachers or the principal is responsible.
Either the principal or the teachers are responsible.

rules.zh: Either ... or ... 提出兩個肯定選項；neither ... nor ... 表示兩個選項都是否定。
rules.en: Either ... or ... presents two positive alternatives; neither ... nor ... means both alternatives are negative.
examples: Either Amy or Ben will attend.
Neither Amy nor Ben will attend.

rules.zh: Either ... or ... 直接提出兩個選擇；whether ... or ... 常引出間接問題或不確定性。
rules.en: Either ... or ... directly presents two alternatives; whether ... or ... often introduces an indirect question or uncertainty.
examples: I will either stay or leave.
I do not know whether I should stay or leave.

benefits.zh: 這個句型能立即清楚指出正在考慮哪兩個選擇。
benefits.en: This structure tells the listener or reader exactly which two choices are being considered.

benefits.zh: 你不需要在兩個句子中重複相同的主語和動詞。
benefits.en: You do not need to repeat the complete subject and verb in two separate sentences.

benefits.zh: 兩個選項使用相同形式，能讓讀者更容易比較它們。
benefits.en: The matching structure makes it easier for the reader to compare the two choices.

benefits.zh: 當一件事可能有兩個原因時，可以清楚列出兩個解釋。
benefits.en: You can use either ... or ... when there are two possible explanations for a situation.

benefits.zh: 掌握這個框架後，可以在說話時迅速整理兩個選擇。
benefits.en: Once you know the frame, you can organise two choices while speaking without planning a long answer.

benefits.zh: 它提供另一種連接意思的方法，避免反覆使用兩個分開的短句。
benefits.en: Using either ... or ... gives you another way to connect ideas instead of repeatedly using two short sentences.

en: Rewrite each sentence using either ... or ... to present two alternatives.
Preserve the original meaning, tense and important details.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 either ... or ... 改寫以下句子，以表達兩個選擇或可能性。
答案須保留原句的意思、時態和重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: John needs to go, or Mary needs to go.
questions.promptZh: 約翰需要去，或者瑪麗需要去。
questions.answer: Either John or Mary needs to go.
questions.answerZh: 約翰或瑪麗其中一人需要去。
questions.highlight: Either John or Mary needs to go.

questions.prompt: I have two choices: I can call Mia, or I can send her a message.
questions.promptZh: 我有兩個選擇：我可以致電米婭，或者傳訊息給她。
questions.answer: I can either call Mia or send her a message.
questions.answerZh: 我可以選擇致電米婭，或者傳訊息給她。
questions.highlight: I can either call Mia or send her a message.

questions.prompt: We will take the bus, or we will walk home.
questions.promptZh: 我們會乘搭巴士，或者步行回家。
questions.answer: We will either take the bus or walk home.
questions.answerZh: 我們會選擇乘搭巴士，或者步行回家。
questions.highlight: We will either take the bus or walk home.

questions.prompt: One of the two shirts is on sale: the blue shirt or the white shirt.
questions.promptZh: 兩件恤衫之中有一件正在減價：藍色恤衫或白色恤衫。
questions.answer: Either the blue shirt or the white shirt is on sale.
questions.answerZh: 藍色恤衫或白色恤衫之中，有一件正在減價。
questions.highlight: Either the blue shirt or the white shirt is on sale.

questions.prompt: Ben wants tea or coffee.
questions.promptZh: 本想要茶或咖啡。
questions.answer: Ben wants either tea or coffee.
questions.answerZh: 本想要茶或咖啡其中一種。
questions.highlight: Ben wants either tea or coffee.

questions.prompt: You may sit here, or you may wait outside.
questions.promptZh: 你可以坐在這裏，或者在外面等候。
questions.answer: You may either sit here or wait outside.
questions.answerZh: 你可以選擇坐在這裏，或者在外面等候。
questions.highlight: You may either sit here or wait outside.

questions.prompt: My brother feeds the cat, or my sister does.
questions.promptZh: 我的哥哥會餵貓，或者由我的妹妹餵貓。
questions.answer: Either my brother or my sister feeds the cat.
questions.answerZh: 我的哥哥或妹妹其中一人會餵貓。
questions.highlight: Either my brother or my sister feeds the cat.

questions.prompt: The answer can only be true or false.
questions.promptZh: 答案只可能是對或錯。
questions.answer: The answer is either true or false.
questions.answerZh: 答案不是對，就是錯。
questions.highlight: The answer is either true or false.

questions.prompt: Amy has two plans: she will study at home or go to the library.
questions.promptZh: 艾米有兩個計劃：她會在家溫習，或者去圖書館。
questions.answer: Amy will either study at home or go to the library.
questions.answerZh: 艾米會選擇在家溫習，或者去圖書館。
questions.highlight: Amy will either study at home or go to the library.

questions.prompt: I can meet on Saturday or Sunday.
questions.promptZh: 我可以在星期六或星期日見面。
questions.answer: Either Saturday or Sunday works for me.
questions.answerZh: 星期六或星期日都可以作為我的見面日期。
questions.highlight: Either Saturday or Sunday works for me.

questions.prompt: The children can choose between drawing a picture and writing a story.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們可以選擇畫一幅圖畫或寫一個故事。
questions.answer: The children can either draw a picture or write a story.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們可以選擇畫一幅圖畫，或者寫一個故事。
questions.highlight: The children can either draw a picture or write a story.

questions.prompt: The manager is responsible for opening the meeting, or the assistants are responsible for it.
questions.promptZh: 經理負責主持會議開場，或者由助理們負責。
questions.answer: Either the manager or the assistants are responsible for opening the meeting.
questions.answerZh: 經理或助理們需要負責主持會議開場。
questions.highlight: Either the manager or the assistants are responsible for opening the meeting.

questions.prompt: The package will arrive today or tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 包裹會在今天或明天送達。
questions.answer: The package will arrive either today or tomorrow.
questions.answerZh: 包裹會在今天或明天送達。
questions.highlight: The package will arrive either today or tomorrow.

questions.prompt: We have two options for dinner: cook it ourselves or order some food.
questions.promptZh: 晚餐有兩個選擇：自己煮，或者叫外賣。
questions.answer: We can either cook dinner ourselves or order some food.
questions.answerZh: 我們可以選擇自己煮晚餐，或者叫外賣。
questions.highlight: We can either cook dinner ourselves or order some food.

questions.prompt: One of these things is in the drawer: the keys or the wallet.
questions.promptZh: 這些物品之中有一樣在抽屜裏：鎖匙或銀包。
questions.answer: Either the keys or the wallet is in the drawer.
questions.answerZh: 鎖匙或銀包之中，有一樣在抽屜裏。
questions.highlight: Either the keys or the wallet is in the drawer.

questions.prompt: The room was one of two extremes: too hot or too cold.
questions.promptZh: 房間的溫度處於兩個極端之一：太熱或太冷。
questions.answer: The room was either too hot or too cold.
questions.answerZh: 房間不是太熱，就是太冷。
questions.highlight: The room was either too hot or too cold.

questions.prompt: Perhaps Chloe left her umbrella at school. Another possibility is that she forgot to bring it.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊可能把雨傘留在學校。另一個可能是她忘記帶雨傘。
questions.answer: Chloe either left her umbrella at school or forgot to bring it.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊可能把雨傘留在學校，或者忘記帶雨傘。
questions.highlight: Chloe either left her umbrella at school or forgot to bring it.

questions.prompt: You should apologise now. Otherwise, explain what happened later.
questions.promptZh: 你應該現在道歉，否則便在稍後解釋發生了甚麼事。
questions.answer: You should either apologise now or explain what happened later.
questions.answerZh: 你應該選擇現在道歉，或者在稍後解釋發生了甚麼事。
questions.highlight: You should either apologise now or explain what happened later.

questions.prompt: One of the two doors was unlocked: the front door or the back door.
questions.promptZh: 兩道門之中有一道沒有上鎖：前門或後門。
questions.answer: Either the front door or the back door was unlocked.
questions.answerZh: 前門或後門之中，有一道門沒有上鎖。
questions.highlight: Either the front door or the back door was unlocked.

questions.prompt: The film belongs to one of two types: a comedy or a drama.
questions.promptZh: 這部電影屬於兩種類型之一：喜劇或劇情片。
questions.answer: The film is either a comedy or a drama.
questions.answerZh: 這部電影不是喜劇，就是劇情片。
questions.highlight: The film is either a comedy or a drama.

questions.prompt: We have two choices: postpone the picnic or move it indoors.
questions.promptZh: 我們有兩個選擇：延期舉行野餐，或者把活動移到室內。
questions.answer: We could either postpone the picnic or move it indoors.
questions.answerZh: 我們可以選擇延期舉行野餐，或者把活動移到室內。
questions.highlight: We could either postpone the picnic or move it indoors.

questions.prompt: One of them has written the date incorrectly: the students or the teacher.
questions.promptZh: 學生或老師之中，有一方把日期寫錯了。
questions.answer: Either the students or the teacher has written the date incorrectly.
questions.answerZh: 學生或老師之中，有一方把日期寫錯了。
questions.highlight: Either the students or the teacher has written the date incorrectly.

questions.prompt: The doctor will prescribe some medicine or suggest more rest.
questions.promptZh: 醫生會處方一些藥物，或者建議多休息。
questions.answer: The doctor will either prescribe some medicine or suggest more rest.
questions.answerZh: 醫生會選擇處方一些藥物，或者建議多休息。
questions.highlight: The doctor will either prescribe some medicine or suggest more rest.

questions.prompt: The missing file is in one of two places: on your computer or in the shared folder.
questions.promptZh: 遺失的檔案在兩個地方之一：你的電腦或共享資料夾內。
questions.answer: The missing file is either on your computer or in the shared folder.
questions.answerZh: 遺失的檔案不是在你的電腦內，就是在共享資料夾內。
questions.highlight: The missing file is either on your computer or in the shared folder.

questions.prompt: You can pay in cash, or you can use a bank card.
questions.promptZh: 你可以使用現金付款，或者使用銀行卡。
questions.answer: You can either pay in cash or use a bank card.
questions.answerZh: 你可以選擇使用現金付款，或者使用銀行卡。
questions.highlight: You can either pay in cash or use a bank card.

questions.prompt: Olivia is going to collect the tickets, or her parents are going to collect them.
questions.promptZh: 奧莉花會領取門票，或者由她的父母領取。
questions.answer: Either Olivia or her parents are going to collect the tickets.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花或她的父母會前往領取門票。
questions.highlight: Either Olivia or her parents are going to collect the tickets.

questions.prompt: There are two likely problems with the machine: it needs a new battery, or it has a loose connection.
questions.promptZh: 這部機器可能有兩個問題：它需要更換電池，或者接駁位置鬆脫。
questions.answer: The machine either needs a new battery or has a loose connection.
questions.answerZh: 這部機器可能需要更換電池，或者接駁位置鬆脫。
questions.highlight: The machine either needs a new battery or has a loose connection.

questions.prompt: Our team will present first or answer questions at the end.
questions.promptZh: 我們的團隊會先作匯報，或者在最後回答問題。
questions.answer: Our team will either present first or answer questions at the end.
questions.answerZh: 我們的團隊會選擇先作匯報，或者在最後回答問題。
questions.highlight: Our team will either present first or answer questions at the end.

questions.prompt: You can reach the fifth floor by using the lift or the stairs.
questions.promptZh: 你可以乘搭升降機或使用樓梯到達五樓。
questions.answer: Either the lift or the stairs will take you to the fifth floor.
questions.answerZh: 升降機或樓梯都可以讓你到達五樓。
questions.highlight: Either the lift or the stairs will take you to the fifth floor.

questions.prompt: The shop gives customers one of two benefits: free delivery or a ten-dollar discount.
questions.promptZh: 商店為顧客提供兩項優惠之一：免費送貨或十元折扣。
questions.answer: The shop offers either free delivery or a ten-dollar discount.
questions.answerZh: 商店提供免費送貨或十元折扣其中一項優惠。
questions.highlight: The shop offers either free delivery or a ten-dollar discount.

questions.prompt: If the weather changes, we will cancel the match or play in the sports hall.
questions.promptZh: 如果天氣有變，我們會取消比賽，或者在體育館內作賽。
questions.answer: If the weather changes, we will either cancel the match or play in the sports hall.
questions.answerZh: 如果天氣有變，我們會選擇取消比賽，或者在體育館內作賽。
questions.highlight: If the weather changes, we will either cancel the match or play in the sports hall.

questions.prompt: One of two things is causing confusion: the new rules or the old system.
questions.promptZh: 造成混亂的是兩項事物之一：新規則或舊制度。
questions.answer: Either the new rules or the old system is causing confusion.
questions.answerZh: 新規則或舊制度之中，有一項正在造成混亂。
questions.highlight: Either the new rules or the old system is causing confusion.

questions.prompt: Guests have two options: bring their own towels or rent them at reception.
questions.promptZh: 住客有兩個選擇：自備毛巾，或者在接待處租用毛巾。
questions.answer: Guests may either bring their own towels or rent them at reception.
questions.answerZh: 住客可以選擇自備毛巾，或者在接待處租用毛巾。
questions.highlight: Guests may either bring their own towels or rent them at reception.

questions.prompt: The message was sent by one of two people: Ava or Daniel.
questions.promptZh: 訊息由兩人之中的一人發出：艾娃或丹尼爾。
questions.answer: The message was sent either by Ava or by Daniel.
questions.answerZh: 訊息由艾娃或丹尼爾其中一人發出。
questions.highlight: The message was sent either by Ava or by Daniel.

questions.prompt: The charity will use the money to buy food or provide temporary shelter.
questions.promptZh: 慈善機構會把款項用於購買食物，或者提供臨時住所。
questions.answer: The charity will use the money either to buy food or to provide temporary shelter.
questions.answerZh: 慈善機構會把款項用於購買食物，或者提供臨時住所。
questions.highlight: The charity will use the money either to buy food or to provide temporary shelter.

questions.prompt: The team found one of two problems behind the desk: a damaged cable or several loose wires.
questions.promptZh: 團隊在書桌後面發現兩種問題之一：一條損壞的電線或數條鬆脫的電線。
questions.answer: Either a damaged cable or several loose wires were found behind the desk.
questions.answerZh: 團隊在書桌後面發現了一條損壞的電線，或者數條鬆脫的電線。
questions.highlight: Either a damaged cable or several loose wires were found behind the desk.

questions.prompt: The speaker has two ways to respond: answer the question directly or give a short example first.
questions.promptZh: 講者有兩種回應方法：直接回答問題，或者先舉一個簡短例子。
questions.answer: The speaker can either answer the question directly or give a short example first.
questions.answerZh: 講者可以選擇直接回答問題，或者先舉一個簡短例子。
questions.highlight: The speaker can either answer the question directly or give a short example first.

questions.prompt: The museum is open from nine to five on some days and from ten to six on others.
questions.promptZh: 博物館在部分日子由九時開放至五時，在其他日子則由十時開放至六時。
questions.answer: The museum is open either from nine to five or from ten to six.
questions.answerZh: 博物館的開放時間不是由九時至五時，就是由十時至六時。
questions.highlight: The museum is open either from nine to five or from ten to six.

questions.prompt: The equipment we need is available at the local clinic or at the two nearby hospitals.
questions.promptZh: 我們需要的設備可在本區診所或附近兩間醫院找到。
questions.answer: Either the local clinic or the two nearby hospitals have the equipment we need.
questions.answerZh: 本區診所或附近兩間醫院備有我們需要的設備。
questions.highlight: Either the local clinic or the two nearby hospitals have the equipment we need.

questions.prompt: The company has only two realistic choices: reduce its costs or find new customers.
questions.promptZh: 公司只有兩個實際可行的選擇：減少成本或尋找新顧客。
questions.answer: The company must either reduce its costs or find new customers.
questions.answerZh: 公司必須選擇減少成本，或者尋找新顧客。
questions.highlight: The company must either reduce its costs or find new customers.

questions.prompt: Parents can book an appointment online or speak to the school office in person.
questions.promptZh: 家長可以在網上預約，或者親身與校務處職員交談。
questions.answer: Parents can either book an appointment online or speak to the school office in person.
questions.answerZh: 家長可以選擇在網上預約，或者親身與校務處職員交談。
questions.highlight: Parents can either book an appointment online or speak to the school office in person.

questions.prompt: There are two possible explanations: the timetable has changed, or the notice contains the wrong date.
questions.promptZh: 事情有兩個可能的解釋：時間表已經更改，或者通告上的日期有誤。
questions.answer: Either the timetable has changed or the notice contains the wrong date.
questions.answerZh: 時間表可能已經更改，或者通告上的日期有誤。
questions.highlight: Either the timetable has changed or the notice contains the wrong date.

questions.prompt: The council has two options: repair the old footbridge or replace it completely.
questions.promptZh: 議會有兩個選擇：維修舊行人天橋，或者把它完全更換。
questions.answer: The council may either repair the old footbridge or replace it completely.
questions.answerZh: 議會可以選擇維修舊行人天橋，或者把它完全更換。
questions.highlight: The council may either repair the old footbridge or replace it completely.

questions.prompt: One of two parties will make the final decision: the project leader or the whole team.
questions.promptZh: 最終決定會由兩方之中的一方作出：項目主管或整個團隊。
questions.answer: The final decision will be made either by the project leader or by the whole team.
questions.answerZh: 最終決定會由項目主管或整個團隊作出。
questions.highlight: The final decision will be made either by the project leader or by the whole team.

questions.prompt: Students should support their opinion with evidence. If the evidence is unavailable, they should explain why.
questions.promptZh: 學生應該使用證據支持自己的意見。如果無法取得證據，他們便應解釋原因。
questions.answer: Students should either support their opinion with evidence or explain why the evidence is unavailable.
questions.answerZh: 學生應該使用證據支持自己的意見，或者解釋為甚麼無法取得證據。
questions.highlight: Students should either support their opinion with evidence or explain why the evidence is unavailable.

questions.prompt: The label was placed on the wrong carton by the delivery driver or the warehouse staff.
questions.promptZh: 送貨司機或倉庫職員把標籤貼在錯誤的紙箱上。
questions.answer: Either the delivery driver or the warehouse staff have placed the label on the wrong carton.
questions.answerZh: 送貨司機或倉庫職員把標籤貼在錯誤的紙箱上。
questions.highlight: Either the delivery driver or the warehouse staff have placed the label on the wrong carton.

questions.prompt: The school can turn the extra room into a quiet study area or a small meeting space.
questions.promptZh: 學校可以把額外的房間改為安靜的自修區，或者小型會議空間。
questions.answer: The school can use the extra room either as a quiet study area or as a small meeting space.
questions.answerZh: 學校可以把額外的房間用作安靜的自修區，或者小型會議空間。
questions.highlight: The school can use the extra room either as a quiet study area or as a small meeting space.

questions.prompt: We may continue with the original plan, or we may make changes after reviewing the new information.
questions.promptZh: 我們可以繼續採用原有計劃，或者在審視新資料後作出修改。
questions.answer: We may either continue with the original plan or make changes after reviewing the new information.
questions.answerZh: 我們可以選擇繼續採用原有計劃，或者在審視新資料後作出修改。
questions.highlight: We may either continue with the original plan or make changes after reviewing the new information.

questions.prompt: There are two possible causes: the safety instructions were unclear, or some workers did not read them carefully.
questions.promptZh: 事情有兩個可能的原因：安全指示不清楚，或者部分工人沒有仔細閱讀指示。
questions.answer: Either the safety instructions were unclear or some workers did not read them carefully.
questions.answerZh: 安全指示可能不清楚，或者部分工人沒有仔細閱讀指示。
questions.highlight: Either the safety instructions were unclear or some workers did not read them carefully.

questions.prompt: The committee has two choices: approve the proposal with minor changes, or reject it and request a completely new version.
questions.promptZh: 委員會有兩個選擇：在作出少量修改後批准建議，或者拒絕建議並要求提交全新版本。
questions.answer: The committee must either approve the proposal with minor changes or reject it and request a completely new version.
questions.answerZh: 委員會必須選擇在作出少量修改後批准建議，或者拒絕建議並要求提交全新版本。
questions.highlight: The committee must either approve the proposal with minor changes or reject it and request a completely new version.
